Video.summary: McCall can't believe that a trauma specialist who once treated her, began drinking again and killed herself.
Video.title: Code 3

Video.summary: SAMMY DAVIS, JR. guest stars as a boxer who helps McCall investigate murders in the world of prize fighting.
Video.title: Ring Of Honor

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow a string of torture murders to a money laundering ring and discover an undercover cop
Video.title: Last Run

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a string of robberies, pursue the thieves, and shoot a man who may be innocent.
Video.title: Shoot To Kill

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall follow the trail of revenge and fraud while investigating the murder of a racehorse.
Video.title: Blood Line

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate teenage prostitute murders and the prime suspect is a sadistic cop impersonator.
Video.title: Teen Dreams

Video.summary: Reno's surprise reunion with Leeza Bendetti at Bobby's scenic Duck Lake cabin is soured when he stumbles upon a trio of drug dealers and their rolling narcotics lab in the adjoining woods.
Video.title: Rabbit Redux

Video.summary: Cheyenne convinces a reluctant Bobby to post bail and help prove the innocence of her unrequited love who has been arrested for the murder of his wife, Marily
Video.title: Once Burned, Twice Chey

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby travel to the tiny town in New Mexico, on the trail of a bail-jumper to find him being hunted down by a posse for murder.
Video.title: The Posse

Video.summary: Reno stumbles into a man-hunt for brothers wanted for armed robbery and the confrontation results in the shooting death of the local sheriff.
Video.title: Sheriff Reno

Video.summary: Appearances are deceiving, when Reno discovers a look alike is committing crimes in his name.
Video.title: The Two Renos

Video.summary: Reno rolls into town, tracking a gang of vicious cutthroats.
Video.title: Billy

Video.summary: A desperate psychotic escapes from a prison with a plan for revenge against the men who put him behind bars: Reno and Bobby.
Video.title: Headcase

Video.summary: The five-year old disappearance of B-movie starlet sends Reno south of the border, following a hot tip from one of Bobby's informants.
Video.title: The Hot Tip

Video.summary: When crooked Circuit Prosecutor Eli Starke hires some local thugs to thwart the efforts of a group of ex-convicts trying to go straight, Reno comes to their rescue.
Video.title: Moody River

Video.summary: Reno's old friend, D.A. Harry Wells, recruits him to help find his daughter Dawn, who is being held hostage by her drug-dealing boyfriend.
Video.title: Vanished

Video.summary: A ghost from Reno's past appears and convinces him that his older brother Mitch, who went MIA over Cambodia 17 years ago and whom the government declared dead, is still alive.
Video.title: Fighting Cage, Part 1

Video.summary: Rita takes in a homeless young girl who has witnessed a brutal murder.
Video.title: Lady Luck

Video.summary: Rita and Chris defend Rita’s friend accused of killing her nanny amid her husband’s secret affair.
Video.title: The Sock Drawer

Video.summary: Rita and Chris go undercover to trap a killer who runs a string of illegal gambling casinos.
Video.title: Internal Affairs

Video.summary: Chris becomes involved with a college prostitute as he and Rita attempt to solve the death of another.
Video.title: Working Girl

Video.summary: Hutch goes undercover as a drug dealer to help Chris and Rita solve the murder of a young bystander.
Video.title: Powder Burn

Video.summary: A man who was going to turn his money to his wife leaving his children out is killed. And naturally the investigation focuses on the children.
Video.title: Private Dancer

Video.summary: After saving a neighbor from her violent ex-husband, Michael finds himself being accused of murder.
Video.title: Body Electric

Video.summary: Palm Beach homicide detectives Tom Ryan and Cassy St. John suspect that a Navy test pilot death in a plane crash was no accident.
Video.title: Runway Strip

Video.summary: After arresting a woman for the murder of her business partners, Tom and Cassy uncover evidence that she may have been framed.
Video.title: Compulsion

Video.summary: While investigating the murder of a lawyer, Tom and Cassy come in contact with the judge who preside over their divorce, whom Tom thinks was unfair when he presided.
Video.title: Divorce, Palm Beach Style
